description: A photograph of a wide, sandy beach extending into the distance under a blue sky with scattered white clouds. The sandy foreground shows faint tire tracks. The beach meets the ocean on the right side of the image, where small waves are visible breaking on the shore. The horizon line between the ocean and sky is clear, with a slight haze visible in the far distance. This image visually represents a "Beaches and Dunes" land cover type, corresponding to CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class 6.2.1.0.
